classObjective: Recognize patterns in numerical, geometric, and real-world sequences and express them as conjectures.
workedExamples: 12-1, Example 2 — Make Conjectures about Numbers and Geometry
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: additive and multiplicative patterns; geometric conjectures; forming and testing conjectures
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice recognizing patterns and forming conjectures
independentPractice: Practice problems identifying patterns and writing conjectures for sequences
assessment: Exit ticket: identify the pattern in a sequence and write a conjecture about what will happen next
capReflection: What makes a conjecture different from a proven theorem?
